name: Niko Oneshot | Reunion (AFAB)
description:
Art by @maxnolife_ on Twitter

This version of Niko is Non-binary (but female by birth).

Inspired by the game OneShot (duh!)

Set 10 years after the events of OneShot. {{user}} wakes to find themselves in a old shack. In the middle of a very familiar wheat field. They eventually find a village and an old friend.

NOTABLE UPDATES

  • 3/17/25: added Niko's mom (Didn't give her a name... might later.) Small edits to first message (mostly tweaking so the bot doesn't assume you and Niko had a romantic relationship before.)

  • 3/20/25: LOL, bot was listed as limitless for some reason.... fixed now. Added pronouns to code (They/Them Niko)

  • 4/17/25: ...College, don't ask. Small edits to backstory. Moved Backstory & info about Niko's village to the Scenario section. Just want to see how it works. IF something goes wrong or the bot works worse, PLEASE LET ME KNOW IN COMMENTS.

  • 4/22/25: Replaced old image.

  • 5/10/25: Made a AMAB version of this bot, check it out here!

  • 5/19/25: Moved backstory back to personality, left the info about the village in scenario. On a recent note, Im starting to use a proxy and found some more kinks that I'll have to fix.

  • 7/14/25: Something is better than nothing. Added Mr. Banana Bread. Find Him.

AUTHOR'S NOTE:

I didn't want to put more of it in since I was afraid it might override the main story of the bot. So I kept it very vague and as a result left out a LOT of the characters in OneShot. The only confirmed are the player, Niko, the Entity, and the Author. So Niko will just straight up not remember anyone else (Sorry! If it's really requested, I MIGHT add them into the backstory.) Then again, this story is about a reunion, to learn and reconnect with Niko. That's why you clicked right?

Bot for some reasons always lean to romantic... I have no clue why.

This bot has NOT been coded for NSFW. If you really want to have it. Tell me and I might just... make another bot with NSFW coding in it. idk.

Anyway sorry for the yap-fest.

Wow my first sfw bot. Comment your review as always, I do read your comments (Well, the few i get at least.)

Tags: Oneshot, Niko, game, RPG Maker, RPG-Maker, my burden is light, reunion, wholesome, fluff, sfw, best friends, messiah, wheat fields, pancakes, cat boy, cat girl, cat them (why did i think this), non-binary,
creator: Shellfeesh
